overview: A professional website for Perfect Designing Hub (PDH), an ISO 9001:2015 certified engineering consultancy based in Bhilai, India. Features all 8 sections from the company profile, sticky table of contents, chatbot, WhatsApp integration, and an embedded office map.
features: Sticky table of contents sidebar with active section tracking
Built-in chatbot with Q&A about services and company info
WhatsApp floating button for quick contact
Embedded OpenStreetMap for office location in Bhilai
Professional teal/navy branding with ISO certification highlights
Responsive layout for mobile, tablet, and desktop
